sub_specs.title: Dexie v8 Schema Migration
key_decisions: Backup target: localStorage (key forge:backup:pre-encounter-rework-{date}.json) — browser Dexie has no filesystem; phase spec pre-authorized this fallback
Used generateId() from ../../utils/ids instead of crypto.randomUUID() (matches existing v6 migration pattern)
Folded participant mutation into the encounter .update() call for one round-trip per row
Upgrade function is ~60 lines, well under the 80-line split threshold
sub_specs.manual_verification_needed: Open dev app, check IndexedDB → skaldbok-db version === 8, localStorage has forge:backup:pre-encounter-rework-YYYY-MM-DD.json, no console errors

sub_specs.title: Encounter + EntityLink Data Layer Extensions
key_decisions: Rewrote encounterRepository.end() to call endActiveSegment() then flip status — in-scope fix for the now-gone scalar startedAt/endedAt
Bled into 8 Sub-Spec-5 files with a mix of @ts-expect-error (writes) and structural casts (reads), every one tagged TODO(sub-spec-5) for Sub-Spec 5 to clean up
Used Map<id, EntityLink> with inline already-deleted filter in softDeleteLinksForEncounter (skips re-writing already-deleted rows)
useEncounter.startEncounter and SessionScreen.handleStartEncounter inline-updated because the fix was trivial (segments: [{startedAt: now}] + tags: [])

sub_specs.title: useSessionEncounter Hook + Context
key_decisions: Typed local updates variable as Partial<Encounter> instead of Record<string, unknown> (Dexie v4 UpdateSpec<T> compatibility)
Used (existing as Encounter).deletedAt cast in reopenEncounter matching Sub-Spec 3's encounterRepository style

sub_specs.title: useSessionLog + useEncounter Extensions
key_decisions: logToSession detects body inside typeData and extracts it to the note's body column — keeps public signature uniform
Continued emitting the session→note contains edge (on top of the new encounter→note edge) because session exports and KB graph sync depend on it
addParticipantFromTemplate made polymorphic (CreatureTemplate | CharacterRecord | string) with addParticipantFromCharacter(id) as a thin wrapper — avoided a ripple edit across the party picker UI
Implemented the full represents entity-link walk in collectors.ts (~15 lines) instead of deferring to TODO(phase-2-export)
quickCreateParticipant caller in EncounterScreen was rewritten in-place (create template + addParticipantFromTemplate) since there were no external callers

build_verification: PASS — npm run build (tsc -b && vite build) passes cleanly after every wave and at the end.
lint_status: SKIPPED — ESLint not installed in this repo (pre-existing environment drift, not a regression). TypeScript via tsc -b provides full static verification.
remaining_work: Sub-Spec 8 — Quick Log Palette: New Actions + Attach-To Control
Sub-Spec 9 — Verification, Cleanup, and End-to-End Smoke
